name: Brociolone
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a pan and add carrot, onion, celery, and garlic. Cook for 8 minutes over moderately low heat.
2. Add herbs, tomatoes, salt, and pepper. Simmer for an hour or more.
3. Combine stuffing ingredients, blending with hands.
4. Pound veal slices thin and divide stuffing among them. Roll up veal around stuffing and secure with a toothpick.
5. Heat oil in pan, then brown veal rolls, pouring off fat.
6. Add sauce and simmer veal rolls, covered, for 1 hour or until tender when pierced with knife.
